title: Weekend Box Office: Michael Thrills with Biggest Opening Ever for Musical Biopic
text:
Weekend Box Office Report highlighting major 2025 releases and box office trends:

Major Box Office News:

Michael dominates with a record-breaking opening for music biopics, earning $97 million in its debut weekend. The King of Pop easily bested the previous highs set by Straight Outta Compton, Bohemian Rhapsody, and Elvis.

Key Performance Metrics:

The biopic surpassed previous musical biography records significantly:
- Straight Outta Compton: $60.2 million
- Bohemian Rhapsody: $51.0 million
- Elvis: $31.2 million

The film nearly doubled those three films together entirely ($52.5 million). However, production costs were substantial, with budget estimates ranging from $150 million to $200 million following reshoots.

Other Top Performers:

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie maintained strong performance in its fourth weekend with $21.2 million, bringing its domestic total to $386.4 million and over $831 million worldwide.

Project Hail Mary continues its theatrical run, crossing the $300 million domestic threshold with a $13.2 million weekend take.

Upcoming Competition:

Next week's releases include The Devil Wears Prada 2 and horror film Hokum, which reportedly earned a solid 97% with critics.

Note: This report represents data from April 2026, reflecting late-stage theatrical performance of 2025 releases continuing in extended runs into 2026.
